import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "AEMO_Bronze"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Bronze_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)

# Create AEMO Dir if it does not exist
dirs_in_bronze =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/")]
if "AEMO" not in dirs_in_bronze:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")

# Create NEM12 Dir if it does not exist 
dirs_in_aemo =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO")]

if "NEM12" not in dirs_in_aemo:
    mssparkutils.fs.mkdirs(f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12")
#Set table name
db_tablename="nem12_bronze"

# Delete Raw table and files
spark.sql("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS aemo_bronze.nem12_raw;")
raw_output_path = f"abfss://bronze@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12/nem12_raw"
dirs_in_bronze =  [f.name for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://bronze@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12")]
if "nem12_raw" in dirs_in_bronze:
    mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)

#Create Bronze Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    Nem12HashKey STRING,
    CDC_LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    UpdateDateTime STRING,
    MSATSLoadDateTime STRING,
    CreationDate STRING, 
    VersionHeader STRING,
    Timestamp TIMESTAMP,
    DisplayTimestamp_d STRING,
    FromParticipant STRING,
    ToParticipant STRING,
    NMI STRING,
    NMIConfiguration STRING,
    RegisterID STRING,
    NMISuffix STRING,
    MDMDataStreamIdentifier STRING,
    MeterSerialNumber STRING, 
    UnitOfMeasurementId STRING,
    IntervalLength DOUBLE,
    IntervalIndex INT,
    IntervalDate STRING, 
    NextScheduledReadDate STRING, 
    Usage DOUBLE, 
    FinalQualityMethodId STRING, 
    FinalReasonCodeId STRING, 
    FinalReasonDescription STRING,
    QualityMethodId STRING,
    ReasonCodeId STRING,
    ReasonDescription STRING, 
    NormalizedTimeStart STRING,
    NormalizedTimeEnd STRING,
    TransCodeId STRING, 
    RetServiceOrder STRING, 
    ReadDatetime STRING,
    IndexRead STRING,
    FileName STRING
     
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
# Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]

import json
from py4j.java_gateway import java_import


def execute_raw_sql(db_query):
    
    db_port = 1433
    linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
    linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
    sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
    db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
    access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

    jdbc_url = f"jdbc:sqlserver://{sql_server_name}:1433;database={db_name};encrypt=true;hostNameInCertificate=*.database.windows.net"
    java_import(spark._sc._gateway.jvm, "java.util.Properties")

    # Create Java Properties object
    props = spark._sc._gateway.jvm.Properties()
    props.setProperty("accessToken", access_token)
    props.setProperty("driver", "com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerDriver")
    
    # Establish a JDBC connection
    connection = spark._sc._gateway.jvm.java.sql.DriverManager.getConnection(jdbc_url, props)
    
    
    # Create a cursor object
    statement = connection.createStatement()
 
    # Pass in Query 
    statement.execute(db_query) 

    connection.commit()
    statement.close()
    connection.close()

from datetime import datetime 
import re

df  = df.pandas_api()

# Process NEM files and put them in raw 
files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(f"abfss://raw@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12")
for f in files:
   df = spark.read.text(f'abfss://raw@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12/{f.name}', wholetext=True)
   df  = df.pandas_api()
   data = df.iloc[0].value

   # Extracing text from df
   pattern = r'<CSVIntervalData>(.*?)</CSVIntervalData>'

   matches = re.findall(pattern, data, re.DOTALL)

   for m in matches:

      try:
         mssparkutils.notebook.run("DataHubBatchScripts/AEMO/AEMO_Landing",90,{
         "file_text":m,
         "source_file":f.name,
         "source_storage":source_storage,
         "source_path":"AEMO/NEM12",
         "source_container":"raw",
         "destination_container": destination_container,
         "destination_storage":destination_storage,
         "destination_path":"AEMO/NEM12"
         })

      except Exception as e:
         error_message = str(e).replace('\'', '\'\'')
         execute_raw_sql(f"INSERT INTO [CTL].AEMO_CORRUPT_FILES (FileName,ErrorMessage,[Timestamp]) VALUES ('{f.name}','{error_message}','{datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}');")
         continue
#Load raw data
raw_df = spark.read.table("aemo_bronze.nem12_raw")
display(raw_df)

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format, to_date, col,when,expr, hour, minute,floor, udf
from pyspark.sql.types import StringType
from pyspark.sql.types import TimestampType
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("IntervalDate", col("IntervalDate").cast("string"))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("NormalizedTimeStart", col("NormalizedTimeStart").cast("string"))
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("NormalizedTimeEnd", col("NormalizedTimeEnd").cast("string"))

# Concatenate IntervalDate and NormalizedTime strings with a space in between to form a datetime string
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("datetime_str", concat(col("IntervalDate"), lit(" "), col("NormalizedTimeStart")))

# Convert the datetime string to a timestamp
# Assuming the time is in HH:mm format
raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("Timestamp", to_timestamp(col("datetime_str"), "yyyyMMdd HH:mm"))
 
def create_interval_string(interval_minutes):
  return f"Timestamp + INTERVAL {int(interval_minutes)} MINUTES"


def add_dynamic_interval(timestamp, interval_minutes):
  if timestamp is None or interval_minutes is None:
    return None 
  if isinstance(interval_minutes,float):
    interval_minutes = int(interval_minutes)
  return timestamp + timedelta(minutes=interval_minutes)


add_dynamic_interval_udf = udf(add_dynamic_interval, TimestampType())


raw_df = raw_df.withColumn(
"DisplayTimestamp_d"
,
    when(
        (hour(col(
"Timestamp"
)) == 23) & (minute(col(
"Timestamp"
)) >= 55),
        to_timestamp(concat(date_format(col(
"Timestamp"
),
"yyyy-MM-dd"
), lit(
" 00:00:00"
)))
    ).otherwise(
        add_dynamic_interval_udf(col("Timestamp"), col("IntervalLength"))))
display(raw_df.select("Timestamp","IntervalLength","IntervalIndex","DisplayTimestamp_d").filter(col("IntervalLength") == 5))

# Add CDC columns
from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws


raw_df = raw_df.withColumn('Nem12HashKey',sha2(concat_ws("||",'NMI','FromParticipant',"NMIConfiguration",'ToParticipant','RegisterID','NMISuffix','MeterSerialNumber','UnitOfMeasurementId','IntervalLength','IntervalDate','MDMDataStreamIdentifier','Timestamp'),256))
#raw_df = raw_df.withColumn('Nem12HashDiff', sha2(concat_ws("||",'NMI','RegisterID','NMIConfiguration','IntervalLength','UnitOfMeasurementId','Timestamp','IntervalDate','VersionHeader','FromParticipant','ToParticipant','NMISuffix','MDMDataStreamIdentifier','MeterSerialNumber','NextScheduledReadDate','FinalQualityMethodId','FinalReasonCodeId','MSATSLoadDateTime','QualityMethodId','ReasonCodeId','TransCodeId','RetServiceOrder','ReadDatetime','IndexRead','FileName'),256))

from pyspark.sql.types import DateType

raw_df = raw_df.withColumn("CDC_LoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Bronze_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
spark.sql("USE aemo_bronze");
display(raw_df)

from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import DateType


  # SCD2 logic
  # Create a temporary view of the dataframe
raw_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

  # Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
      INSERT INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
        (VersionHeader,CreationDate,Timestamp,DisplayTimestamp_d,FromParticipant,ToParticipant,NMI,NMIConfiguration,RegisterID,NMISuffix,
        MDMDataStreamIdentifier,MeterSerialNumber, UnitOfMeasurementId, IntervalLength, IntervalIndex,IntervalDate, NextScheduledReadDate, 
        Usage, FinalQualityMethodId,FinalReasonCodeId, FinalReasonDescription, UpdateDateTime, MSATSLoadDateTime, QualityMethodId, ReasonCodeId, ReasonDescription,
        NormalizedTimeStart,NormalizedTimeEnd, TransCodeId, RetServiceOrder, ReadDatetime, IndexRead,FileName,
        CDC_LoadDate, Nem12HashKey)
        SELECT s.VersionHeader,s.CreationDate,s.Timestamp,s.DisplayTimestamp_d,s.FromParticipant,s.ToParticipant,s.NMI,s.NMIConfiguration,s.RegisterID,s.NMISuffix,
        s.MDMDataStreamIdentifier,s.MeterSerialNumber, s.UnitOfMeasurementId, s.IntervalLength, s.IntervalIndex,s.IntervalDate, s.NextScheduledReadDate, 
        s.Usage, s.FinalQualityMethodId,s.FinalReasonCodeId, s.FinalReasonDescription, s.UpdateDateTime, s.MSATSLoadDateTime, s.QualityMethodId, s.ReasonCodeId, s.ReasonDescription,
        s.NormalizedTimeStart,s.NormalizedTimeEnd, s.TransCodeId, s.RetServiceOrder, s.ReadDatetime, s.IndexRead, s.FileName,
        s.CDC_LoadDate, s.Nem12HashKey
        FROM temp_table s;
#Row count parameters
Bronze_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Bronze_Update = 0
Bronze_Insert = (Bronze_Insert_Post - Bronze_Insert_Pre)
Bronze_Delete = 0
Bronze_ActiveRows = 0
Bronze_TotalRows = Bronze_Insert_Post

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Bronze_LoadDate,Bronze_Insert,Bronze_Update,Bronze_Delete,Bronze_ActiveRows,Bronze_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

# Write to controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

# Cleanup Raw Files 
raw_output_path = f"abfss://raw@{source_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/AEMO/NEM12/"
mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)
